nav.verifyBanner: Please verify your email — check your inbox.

login.title: Welcome back 👋
login.subtitle: Log in to your PlayWithPro account
login.errorGoogle: Google sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
login.errorGoogleEmail: An account with this email already exists. Log in with your password, then link Google in settings.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Free to join — pay only when you book
register.footer: We'll send a verification link · No Google account required
register.failed: Registration failed. Check the details and try again.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.success: Your email is verified. You're all set! ✅
verifyEmail.invalid: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.resendPrompt: Enter your email and we'll send a fresh link.
verifyEmail.resent: If an account exists for this email, a new link is on its way.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists for this email, a reset link is on its way.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: The link is valid for 1 hour and can be used once.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. Log in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

oauthComplete.title: One last step 🏓
oauthComplete.subtitle: Tell us how you'll use PlayWithPro
oauthComplete.expired: Your sign-up session expired. Please start again.

amateur.title: My sessions
amateur.empty: Booked sessions with coaches will appear here.

professional.title: Overview
professional.empty: Your bookings, availability and earnings will appear here.

admin.title: Verification queue
admin.empty: Professional verification requests will appear here.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Your profile, password and connected accounts

profile.title: Profile
profile.error: Could not save changes. Please try again.
profile.timezoneInvalid: Pick a timezone from the list.

password.title: Password
password.changed: Password changed. Other sessions were signed out.
password.noPassword: This account has no password yet. Use "Forgot password?" on the login page to set one.

google.title: Connected accounts
google.needPassword: Set a password first so you don't lose access to your account.

proProfile.title: My profile
proProfile.subtitle: What amateurs will see once you're verified

status.draft: Draft — fill in your profile and submit it for verification.
status.pending_review: Under review — we'll reach out for a short video call to verify your identity.
status.verified: Verified ✅ — amateurs will find you once booking opens.

about.title: About you
about.error: Could not save. Please try again.
about.textPlaceholder: Playing career, titles, coaching style, notable students…
about.optionalHint: Optional — for well-known pros this is easy to find anyway.

services.title: Services & pricing
services.video_analysisDescription: Review uploaded footage together on a call
services.consultationDescription: A plain video call — tactics, equipment, anything
services.venueHint: Pick a suggestion — the pin can be dragged to the exact spot.

verification.title: Verification
verification.alreadyVerified: Your profile is verified. Nothing else to do here. 🏓
verification.pendingInfo: Your request is in the review queue. We'll email you the result.
verification.contactHint: We verify every coach in a short video call — leave at least one way to reach you. Used only for verification and never shown on the site.

adminVerification.title: Verification queue
adminVerification.notePlaceholder: Reason shown to the coach (required to reject)

home.heroSubtitle: Upload your game footage, book a video session with a verified pro, and get personal feedback — in your language.
home.heroImageAlt: An amateur and a professional in a table tennis rally
home.step1Body: Record a match or training drill and upload it. The coach reviews it before your call.
home.step2Body: Filter verified pros by language, service and price. Book a free slot — it lands in both calendars with a video link.
home.step3Body: Join the video call, get your analysis. Your payment is only released to the coach after the session happens.

meta.title: PlayWithPro — Where amateurs and pros play together
meta.description: Upload your game footage, book a video session with a verified pro, and get personal feedback — in your language.
